mapper.select: SELECT rp.*, u.real_name AS student_name, t.title AS task_title, r.file_name FROM evaluation_report rp LEFT JOIN student u ON rp.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN training_task t ON rp.task_id = t.id LEFT JOIN training_result r ON rp.task_id = r.task_id AND rp.student_id = r.student_id WHERE rp.id = #{id}

SELECT rp.*, u.real_name AS student_name, t.title AS task_title, r.file_name FROM evaluation_report rp LEFT JOIN student u ON rp.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN training_task t ON rp.task_id = t.id LEFT JOIN training_result r ON rp.task_id = r.task_id AND rp.student_id = r.student_id ORDER BY rp.create_time DESC

SELECT rp.*, u.real_name AS student_name, t.title AS task_title, r.file_name FROM evaluation_report rp LEFT JOIN student u ON rp.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN training_task t ON rp.task_id = t.id LEFT JOIN training_result r ON rp.task_id = r.task_id AND rp.student_id = r.student_id WHERE rp.task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY rp.create_time DESC

SELECT rp.*, u.real_name AS student_name, t.title AS task_title, r.file_name FROM evaluation_report rp LEFT JOIN student u ON rp.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN training_task t ON rp.task_id = t.id LEFT JOIN training_result r ON rp.task_id = r.task_id AND rp.student_id = r.student_id WHERE rp.task_id = #{taskId} AND rp.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY rp.create_time DESC

SELECT rp.*, u.real_name AS student_name, t.title AS task_title, r.file_name FROM evaluation_report rp LEFT JOIN student u ON rp.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN training_task t ON rp.task_id = t.id LEFT JOIN training_result r ON rp.task_id = r.task_id AND rp.student_id = r.student_id LEFT JOIN course c ON t.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} ORDER BY rp.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evaluation_report (task_id, student_id, total_score, report_data, export_format) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{studentId}, #{totalScore}, #{reportData}, #{exportFormat})
